monetary_account_id.description: The id of the monetary account this action links to.

card_id.description: The id of the card this action links to.

amount_local.description: The amount of the transaction in local currency.

amount_converted.description: The amount of the transaction in local currency.

amount_billing.description: The amount of the transaction in the monetary account's currency.

amount_original_local.description: The original amount in local currency.

amount_original_billing.description: The original amount in the monetary account's currency.

amount_fee.description: The fee amount as charged by the merchant, if applicable.

card_authorisation_id_response.description: The response code by which authorised transaction can be identified as authorised by bunq.

decision.description: Why the transaction was denied, if it was denied, or just ALLOWED.

payment_status.description: The payment status of the transaction. For example PAYMENT_SUCCESSFUL, for a successful payment.

decision_description.description: Empty if allowed, otherwise a textual explanation of why it was denied.

decision_description_translated.description: Empty if allowed, otherwise a textual explanation of why it was denied in user's language.

decision_together_url.description: Empty if allowed or if no relevant Together topic exists, otherwise contains the URL for a Together topic with more information about the decision.

description.description: The description for this transaction to display.

authorisation_status.description: The status in the authorisation process.

authorisation_type.description: The type of transaction that was delivered using the card.

pan_entry_mode_user.description: The type of entry mode the user used. Can be 'ATM', 'ICC', 'MAGNETIC_STRIPE' or 'E_COMMERCE'.

settlement_status.description: The setlement status in the authorisation process.

clearing_status.description: The clearing status of the authorisation. Can be 'PENDING', 'FIRST_PRESENTMENT_COMPLETE' or 'REFUND_LENIENCY'.

city.description: The city where the message originates from as announced by the terminal.

alias.description: The monetary account label of the account that this action is created for.

counterparty_alias.description: The monetary account label of the counterparty.

merchant_id.description: The identification string of the merchant.

token_status.description: If this is a tokenisation action, this shows the status of the token.

reservation_expiry_time.description: If this is a reservation, the moment the reservation will expire.

clearing_expiry_time.description: The time when the processing of the clearing is expired, refunding the authorisation.

applied_limit.description: The type of the limit applied to validate if this MasterCardAction was within the spending limits. The returned string matches the limit types as defined in the card endpoint.

secure_code_id.description: The secure code id for this mastercard action or null.

wallet_provider_id.description: The ID of the wallet provider as defined by MasterCard. 420 = bunq Android app with Tap&Pay; 103 = Apple Pay.

request_reference_split_the_bill.description: The reference to the object used for split the bill. Can be RequestInquiry or RequestInquiryBatch

all_mastercard_action_refund.description: A reference to the Refunds if they exist.

pos_card_presence.description: The Card Presence type of the POS.

pos_card_holder_presence.description: The Card Holder Presence type of the POS.

eligible_whitelist_id.description: The whitelist id for this action or null.

cashback_payout_item.description: The cashback payout item for this action or null

blacklist.description: The blacklist enabled for the merchant of this transaction

additional_authentication_status.description: The status of the additional authentication performed (3ds) by the user for this transaction.
